nodes.context: Penang-based Chinese secret society active in Malaya and Singapore, involved in tin mining and warfare.
Chinese secret society, rival of Hai San, involved in the Larut Wars over tin mines.
Chinese secret society absorbed by Hai San around 1854.

nodes.original_text_name: Tokong or Tua Peh Kong society
nodes.context: Penang-based Chinese secret society allied with Hai San, financed tin mining in Larut.

edges.context: The two societies fought in the Larut Wars (1862-1873) over tin mines in Larut and also clashed in Selangor.
Hai San absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
Hai San was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining in Larut.
